---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new playbook, module, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What pain point does this solve? What is currently impossible or awkward?

## Proposed solution

How would you address it? If this needs a new playbook or module, sketch its name and scope.

## Scope and boundaries

- Does this require an ADR? (See [`docs/adr/`](../../docs/adr/))
- Does it cross the host / app ownership boundary?
- Does it introduce a new external dependency?
- Does it add a new playbook number or convention?

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve the same problem? Why is your proposal better?

## Additional context

Links to related issues, ADRs, or runbooks.
